title: Manufacturing Engineer - Orient Electric Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Orient Electric Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Orient Electric Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Navi Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Orient Electric Ventures Solutions:
Orient Electric Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Orient Electric Ventures Solutions!
